segments.text: I lifted up mine eyes again, and looked, and behold a man with a measuring line in his hand.
To measure Jerusalem, to see what is the breadth thereof, and what is the length thereof.
segments.speaker: Man with measuring line

segments.text: And, behold, the angel that talked with me went forth, and another angel went out to meet him,
Run, speak to this young man, saying, Jerusalem shall be inhabited as towns without walls for the multitude of men and cattle therein:
segments.speaker: Angel

segments.text: I will be unto her a wall of fire round about, and will be the glory in the midst of her.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Ho, ho, come forth, and flee from the land of the north: for I have spread you abroad as the four winds of the heaven,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Deliver thyself, O Zion, that dwellest with the daughter of Babylon.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: After the glory hath he sent me unto the nations which spoiled you: for he that toucheth you toucheth the apple of his eye.
segments.speaker: The LORD of hosts

segments.text: I will shake mine hand upon them, and they shall be a spoil to their servants: and ye shall know that the LORD of hosts hath sent me.
segments.speaker: The LORD of hosts

segments.text: Sing and rejoice, O daughter of Zion: for, lo, I come, and I will dwell in the midst of thee,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And many nations shall be joined to the LORD in that day, and shall be my people: and I will dwell in the midst of thee, and thou shalt know that the LORD of hosts hath sent me unto thee.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And the LORD shall inherit Judah his portion in the holy land, and shall choose Jerusalem again.
Be silent, O all flesh, before the LORD: for he is raised up out of his holy habitation.
segments.speaker: Prophet

footnotes: his…: Heb. the habitation of his holiness
